##NAMES=Sincosite
##RRUFFID=R141154
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca(VO)_2_(PO_4_)_2_·4H_2_O
##LOCALITY=South Rasmussen Ridge mine, Caribou County, Idaho, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Tom Loomis
##DESCRIPTION=Both dark brassy green and bright green platy crystals. Crystals twinned by a 2-fold around [1 -1 0].
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R141154
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 6.385 b: 6.4 c: 6.549 alpha: 93.62 beta: 106.43 gamma: 90.21 volume: 256.1 crystal system: triclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
